name: the-new-menopause
description: Dr. Mary Claire Haver's comprehensive guide to menopause — the science, the symptoms, the treatments, and the strategies to navigate hormonal change with knowledge and power. From the Galveston Diet creator and 3.5M-strong online community.
useCase: Understanding perimenopause, menopause, and postmenopause; evaluating hormone therapy options; managing 50+ symptoms; navigating the healthcare system; and using nutrition, exercise, and lifestyle strategies to thrive through the transition.
knownRisks: Medical advice — always consult your own doctor before making health decisions
The author has a commercial interest (the Galveston Diet program)
Hormone therapy decisions are highly individual and carry real risks
Some claims about estrogen's protective benefits are still being researched
The book advocates for MHT more strongly than some conservative medical bodies
